emseq_v2_ultrashear_dry_v1.label: EM-seq v2 + UltraShear one-column physical dry deck

items.instruction: Seat the P10 filter-tip rack; tip-rack columns 1 through 6 (A1:H1 through A6:H6) must be intact.
items.why: The six small-volume EM-seq addition legs use these dry-observation tip columns and return them.

items.instruction: Seat the P50 filter-tip rack; tip-rack columns 1 through 5 (A1:H1 through A5:H5) must be intact.
items.why: The five P50 reagent-add modes use these columns; cleanup residual/elution motions reuse column 1 after tips are returned.

items.instruction: Seat the P300 filter-tip rack; tip-rack column 1 (A1:H1) must be intact.
items.why: All three empty cleanup rehearsals use this column for beads, supernatant, and ethanol motions and return the tips.

items.instruction: Seat one bare, empty CellTreat 229195/229196 work plate squarely in the first site.
items.why: This single plate moves through all eight ODTC and all three magnet round trips, then returns here.

items.instruction: Seat the second bare, empty CellTreat 229195/229196 plate squarely; source column 1 must be clear.
items.why: Every dry reagent-add mode models its source at column 1 using the working AmpSeq plate-height logic.

items.instruction: Keep the correct magnet installed and aligned; its plate landing area must be empty with no plate or lid.
items.why: The work plate lands here for each of the three dry SPRI cleanup motion blocks.

items.instruction: Seat the empty, dry trough; A1, A2, A3, A4, and A12 must be empty and clear.
items.why: The cleanup motions model beads, two ethanol washes, elution buffer, and waste at those wells.

items.instruction: Keep the ODTC installed. Confirm its nest is empty, open, cool, idle, and clear for the iSWAP path.
items.why: The work plate completes eight ODTC out-and-back dry transfers; this rehearsal prints thermal notes but does not heat.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm every pipetting channel starts untipped.
global_checks.why: The validated starting state assumes clear channels before each scoped script initializes.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm the iSWAP holds nothing and all rail35-to-magnet and rail35-to-ODTC paths are clear.
global_checks.why: A stale plate, lid, or obstruction makes the recorded physical state false.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm carriers and the installed ODTC are secured at the mapped rail targets 48, 35, and 20.
global_checks.why: The validated geometry is tied to these exact targets and modeled positions.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm there are no samples, reagents, ethanol, or water on the deck.
global_checks.why: The physical release manifest covers empty-labware motion only.

global_checks.instruction: A trained operator remains at the deck with immediate E-stop access for the entire run.
global_checks.why: No browser checklist or software gate replaces continuous physical observation.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm rail35 p0 is the intended final plate site and both the magnet and ODTC nests are empty before launch.
global_checks.why: The 36-leg choreography is stateful and depends on every destination being empty at the correct handoff.
